english translation text:
Bazaar Shaam HaiThis is the Bazaar of DamascusEnglish Transliteration
We have reached the Bazaar

urdu transliteration text:
Mazlum ka kunba, jab shaam ko pohncha, Abid ka tha nawhaLo agaya bazaar
ABID (ZAIN UL ABIDEEN) LAMENTED,
@HujjatELC
Lo Agaya Bazaar
english translation text:
WHEN THE CARAVAN OF THE OPPRESSED ARRIVED IN SHAAM,
WE HAVE REACHED THE BAZAAR OF SHAAM
We have reached the Bazaar

urdu transliteration text:
Meri phuphi amma, roti hai beparda, lakhon ka hai majhmaLo agaya bazaar
MY BELOVED AUNT ZAINAB, IS CRYING WITHOUT A VEIL,
@HujjatELC
Lo Agaya Bazaar
english translation text:
THERE ARE THOUSANDS OF ONLOOKERS,
WE HAVE REACHED THE BAZAAR
We have reached the Bazaar

I AM THINKING OF THIS AND CRYING, THAT MY MOTHERS AND SISTERS ARE BAREHEADED
HOW CAN I EVEN BEAR TO LOOK AT
THIS ATMOSTPHERE IN FRONT OF ME?
We have reached the Bazaar

BUT THERE IS ONE HEAD RAISED ON A SPEAR,
WHICH IS CONSTANTLY CRYING
AND LAMENTING,
WE HAVE REACHED THE BAZAAR
We have reached the Bazaar

MY HANDS ARE TIED, I CANT DO ANYTHING!
THERE IS A SHOWER OF STONES,
AND WE ARE TIED TOGETHER AS TARGETS
We have reached the Bazaar

THERE ARE RIVERS OF BLOOD FLOWING FROM OUR HEADS,
AND THESE MEN ARE LAUGHING AT US,
WE HAVE REACHED THE BAZAAR
We have reached the Bazaar

WITH EVERY STEP OF THIS JOURNEY,
MY FATHER IS RECITING QURAN
AND HE IS BEING HIT WITH FIRE AND STONES TO HIS OWN BLESSED FACE
We have reached the Bazaar

urdu transliteration text:
Zahra Ka Dulara, Ahmed Ka Nawasa,Hai Barsare Neza, Lo Aagaya Bazaar
THE GRANDSON OF AHMED (SAW)
@HujjatELC
Lo Agaya Bazaar
english translation text:
THE BELOVED OF ZAHRA (AS),
IS RAISED UPON A SPEAR,
WE HAVE REACHED THE BAZAAR
We have reached the Bazaar

urdu transliteration text:
Parde Ka Muhafiz Ab, Sar Apna Giraata Hai,Khoon Rota Hai Wo Ghaazi, Jab Bhi Nazar Aata Hai
THE PROTECTOR OF ZAINAB’S VEIL,
@HujjatELC
Lo Agaya Bazaar
english translation text:
IS LETTING HIS HEAD FALL TO THE GROUND
THIS IS ABBAS, CRYING TEARS OF BLOOD WHEN HE WITNESSES THIS
We have reached the Bazaar

urdu transliteration text:
Zainab Ka Khula Sar, Aur Shaam Ka ManzarSar Pe Nahi Parda, Lo Agaya Bazaar
ZAINAB IS BAREHEADED,
@HujjatELC
Lo Agaya Bazaar
english translation text:
AND ALL OF SHAAM IS IN FRONT OF US
SHE HAS NOT EVEN A CLOTH TO PROTECT HER HEAD,
WE HAVE REACHED THE BAZAAR
We have reached the Bazaar

urdu transliteration text:
Aur Shimr Ye Abid (as) Se, Kis Fakhre Se Kehta Hai,Parda Teri Zainab Ka, Neze Pe Utara Hai
USING JUST MY SPEAR”
@HujjatELC
Lo Agaya Bazaar
english translation text:
THEN SHIMR SAYS TO ABID (AS)
WITH SUCH ARROGANCE AND PRIDE,
“I HAVE REMOVED THE VEIL OF YOUR ZAINAB,
We have reached the Bazaar

urdu transliteration text:
Quwwat Hai Ye Meri, Ahmed Ki Nawasi,Ko Shaam Me Layaa, Lo Agaya Bazaar
SHIMR SAYS,
@HujjatELC
Lo Agaya Bazaar
english translation text:
“THIS IS MY MIGHT AND POWER
THAT I MYSELF CAN BRING
THE GRANDDAUGHTER OF THE PROPHET
TO THE BAZAAR OF SHAAM”
We have reached the Bazaar
